mapper.select:
SELECT ar.id, ar.biz_type as bizType, ar.article_id as articleId, ar.audit_status as auditStatus, ar.audit_type as auditType, ar.auditor_id as auditorId, ar.reason, ar.created_at as createdAt, ar.updated_at as updatedAt,
a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.word_count as wordCount, a.created_at as articleCreatedAt,
u.id as authorId, u.nickname as authorNickname, u.avatar as authorAvatar,
au.nickname as auditorNickname,
GROUP_CONCAT(at.name SEPARATOR ', ') as tags
FROM audit_record ar LEFT JOIN article a ON ar.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user au ON ar.auditor_id = au.id LEFT JOIN article_tag_relation atr ON a.id = atr.article_id LEFT JOIN article_tag at ON atr.tag_id = at.id
ar.biz_type = 'ARTICLE'
AND ar.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
GROUP BY ar.id, a.id, u.id, au.id ORDER BY ar.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT ar.id, ar.biz_type as bizType, ar.article_id as articleId, ar.audit_status as auditStatus, ar.audit_type as auditType, ar.auditor_id as auditorId, ar.reason, ar.created_at as createdAt, ar.updated_at as updatedAt,
a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image as coverImage, a.word_count as wordCount, a.created_at as articleCreatedAt,
u.id as authorId, u.nickname as authorNickname, u.avatar as authorAvatar,
au.nickname as auditorNickname
FROM audit_record ar LEFT JOIN article a ON ar.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user au ON ar.auditor_id = au.id WHERE ar.biz_type = 'ARTICLE' AND ar.audit_status IN (1, 2) -- 只显示已通过和已拒绝的记录 AND ar.auditor_id IS NOT NULL -- 确保有审核人 ORDER BY ar.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
